variants: Ayumi Noorani serves as a Planner for Alderstone Festival Council, taking part in creating and executing community events that foster connection and engagement. She was born in Lakefire Settlement, where her love for her hometown took root. Ayumi pursued higher education at Greymoor College of Science, earning a degree with a focus on Italian phonetics. Presently, she is employed at Copper Skies Brewing, where she utilizes her linguistic skills to enhance product development. Her involvement in both brewing and civic activities reflects her commitment to her profession and her community.
